CustomField.label: Record Formula Value
CustomField.description: A Salesforce formula that produces the value to compare against, based on the current record. Used only when Compare Against is "A formula on the record". Formula syntax only — not Apex or SOQL.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Salesforce formula giving the value to compare against, e.g. BillingCity or AnnualRevenue / 10. Used when Compare Against is "A formula on the record".
